consume.execute: strategy_bg.StrategyPlanner(genome) emits one plans.py-DSL plan per turn; every order is validated by the legality gate
consume.retrieve: load doctrine.md + corpus logs into any LLM context; plans are written in the DSL documented in engine/plans.py
consume.train: corpus logs are verified, seeded, replayable (engine/verify_game.py) - clean RL/fine-tune trajectories
